summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 hydrated open PRs. No shared canonical was selected, no GitHub mutations are planned, and no security-sensitive item was quarantined from the hydrated artifact.

actions.reason: Focused open contributor bugfix with proof; keep for maintainer review rather than close or merge in plan mode.
Related maintainer-owned draft in the same plugin metadata hardening family, but not a duplicate of another listed PR.
Related plugin metadata guard work with security-shaped labels but no hydrated boundary-bypass claim; keep for maintainer review.
Clear independent user-facing bugfix, but dirty branch and maintainer rebase signal block merge-style action.
Related hardening PR in the plugin metadata family; no hydrated vulnerability claim requiring route_security.
Related overlapping session-action work, but not safely closable as superseded without a clear canonical replacement.
Independent provider-completeness PR; related prior merged stop work is historical evidence, not a basis for closeout.
Focused independent contributor PR with passing proof; keep for maintainer review in this non-merge plan.
Related plugin metadata guard work, currently waiting on author and not eligible for close or merge action.
